alert.name: Policy V2 7770001: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs
alert.description: This policy contains rules which provide a greater insight into general activities occuring on the system. They are very noisy, but useful in threat hunting situations if you are looking for specific actions being taken during runtime. It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.
alert.subject: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs triggered at 04/28/2026 01:17 PM UTC
alert.body:
Policy event triggered at 04/28/2026 01:17 PM UTC

Policy:             Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs
Policy URL:         https://app.example.sysdig.com/secure//#/policies/7770001
Description:        This policy contains rules which provide a greater insight into general activities occuring on the system. They are very noisy, but useful in threat hunting situations if you are looking for specific actions being taken during runtime. It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.

policies.name: Sysdig Runtime Activity Logs
policies.description: This policy contains rules which provide a greater insight into general activities occuring on the system. They are very noisy, but useful in threat hunting situations if you are looking for specific actions being taken during runtime. It is not recommended to use this policy for detection purposes unless tuning is enabled.  Additional manual tuning will likely be required.
